title: Dollar General Misses Estimates on Softer Sales, Higher Expenses, and Theft

title: Dollar General (DG) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Lag Estimates

title: Dollar General tumbles after cutting guidance on earnings miss
text: Dollar General Corp. (NYSE:DG) stock tumbled 14% in pre-market trading after posting weaker-than-expected second quarter results, due to in part to higher shrinkage, as well as lowering guidance for the full year.  The Goodlettsville, Tennessee-based company reported net income of $468.8 million, or $2.13 a share, for the quarter to August 4, down from $678.0 million, or $2.98 a share, in the year-earlier period.

title: Dollar General Stock Sinks. The Retailer Slashed Its Outlook.

title: Dollar General's stock tumbles premarket after earnings miss and lowered guidance
text: Dollar General Corp.'s stock DG, +1.72% tumbled 13.7% in premarket trade Thursday, after the discount retailer posted weaker-than-expected second-quarter earnings and lowered its guidance. “While we are not satisfied with our overall financial results, we made significant progress in the second quarter improving execution in our supply chain and our stores, as well as reducing our inventory growth rate and further strengthening our price position,” said Jeff Owen, Dollar General's chief executive officer, in a statement.

title: Dollar General 2Q earnings miss expected on continued sales and profitability risks
